product: agg SQL function as a synonym for measure
tagline: The new agg aggregate function is a synonym for measure.
what_it_does: The new agg aggregate function is a synonym for measure. Use agg(measure column) as a shorter alternative when querying measures in a metric view. Metric views are the core implementation of Unity Catalog business semantics in Unity Catalog.
why_it_matters: + Agent metadata in metric views + Add synonyms, display names, and formatting rules to improve AI agent accuracy and display consistent formats across tools.

capabilities.title: Define metric views using SQL
capabilities.desc: Define metric views using SQL DDL or the Catalog Explorer UI, with built-in YAML validation.

capabilities.title: Query metric views from SQL
capabilities.desc: Query metric views from SQL editors, notebooks, dashboards, Genie Agents, and alerts.

key_takeaway: The new agg aggregate function is a synonym for measure.
